tagline: Modern dentistry, a friendlier front desk

services.name: New patient exam & cleaning
services.description: Full checkup, cleaning, and X-rays for first-time patients

services.name: Emergency dental care
services.description: Same-day appointments for pain, chips, or broken teeth

services.name: Invisalign consultation
services.description: Free consult to see if clear aligners are right for you

faqs.question: Do you accept my dental insurance?
faqs.answer: We work with most major insurance providers and can check your coverage before your visit — just have your insurance details ready.

faqs.question: Do you take walk-ins?
faqs.answer: We're appointment-based, but we always hold a few same-day slots for emergencies.

faqs.question: What should I bring to my first appointment?
faqs.answer: A photo ID, your insurance card if you have one, and a list of any current medications.

promotion.headline: Free new-patient exam this month
promotion.details: New patients get a full exam, cleaning, and X-rays at no cost when they book in the next 30 days.
